title: Xtra Smoky Slovakian Hazelnut Skewers
description: A fresh and energizing Slovakian dish featuring shelled hazelnuts, this recipe is perfect for a keto-friendly snack. The smoky flavor comes from the combination of smoked paprika and grilled hazelnuts.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the hazelnuts to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the coated hazelnuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each nut.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and grill for 5 minutes per side, or until the hazelnuts are lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
